backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that mixes in blob storage and authorization, and exposes CRUD endpoints for user profiles, clinics, services, social links, hero settings, and site content with session-based admin authentication.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app that loads Space Grotesk and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React root at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining a public layout route (Header + Footer wrapping MainPage at '/') and a standalone '/admin' route for AdminPanel, wrapped in a dark ThemeProvider with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutEdito: Admin editor component for the About section that allows updating bio text and profile image via textarea and ImageUploadField, using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ClinicsMan: Admin CRUD manager for clinic entries, providing an add/edit form and delete confirmation using React Query mutations and displaying the current clinic list.
frontend/src/components/admin/FooterEdit: Admin editor for footer content text with a textarea and save button, backed by the useUpdateFooterContent mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeaderEdit: Admin editor for the site title and hero background image, supporting text input for the title and base64 image upload/delete via ImageUploadField.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroSettin: Admin editor for hero section visual settings (particle count, speed, size, color, background effects) using range/color inputs and the useUpdateHeroSettings mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImagesMana: Admin UI component for managing the hero background image, supporting file upload (base64, max 5MB), URL input, preview, and deletion via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: Reusable image field component supporting file upload (with 1.5 MB limit, base64 conversion), URL input, preview display, and delete action with loading states.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesMa: Admin UI component for CRUD management of services, including an inline add/edit form with title, description, and icon upload fields backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/SocialLink: Admin UI component for managing social media links (platform + URL), with an inline add/edit form featuring platform autocomplete suggestions and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard with a dark sidebar navigation that switches between section editors (hero, images, header, about, clinics, services, social, footer), loading content data as needed and exposing a logout callback.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login form with username/password inputs, show/hide password toggle, error display, and a TanStack Router Link to return to the homepage; calls the useLogin mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/ClinicCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a clinic with editable name and description fields, displaying address, phone, and action buttons for map and booking URLs with configurable accent colors.
frontend/src/components/EditableField.ts: Wraps any content in an inline-editable popover (text, textarea, or URL) that only activates when an admin session token is present, providing save/cancel controls.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying brand info, editable footer text, social media icon links, navigation links, and a powered-by attribution.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: Reusable dark glass-style card component with configurable accent color borders, hover glow effects, and optional click handler.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware background blur, active section highlighting, mobile menu toggle, and optional theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header and a TanStack Router Outlet as the main content area.
frontend/src/components/ParticleCanvas.t: Animated canvas component that renders configurable floating particles with optional connection lines, mouse interaction, and multiple background effects (aurora, gradient mesh, etc.).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (content, hero settings, images, services, social links, etc.) via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including high-tech accent colors, glow effects, grid patterns, and scan-line utilities.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About section of the site with an optional profile image, editable bio text via EditableField, and decorative stat cards for credentials, experience, and patients.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin route component that checks for a stored session token, validates it against the backend actor, and conditionally renders either the AdminLogin or AdminDashboard component.
frontend/src/pages/Clinics.tsx: Renders a grid of ClinicCard components from a list of clinic data, cycling through accent colors and exposing callbacks for inline name and description editing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Hero section page component featuring a background image, animated particle canvas, editable site title, and scroll-to-section buttons for About and Services.
frontend/src/pages/MainPage.tsx: Top-level page that fetches all site content via React Query hooks and composes the full public-facing site (Header, Home, About, Services, Clinics, SocialMedia, Footer) with inline-edit mutation handlers gated by an admin session token.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: React component that renders a grid of medical services with editable titles and descriptions, displaying a custom icon or fallback stethoscope icon per service. Returns null if no services are provided.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: React component that renders a grid of social media links with platform-specific icons and colors, supporting inline editing of platform name and URL. Returns null if no links are provided.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a high-tech dark theme with custom navy/cyan/magenta/emerald/amber color palettes, Space Grotesk and Inter fonts, glow box shadows, and custom animations for a glassmorphism medical UI.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for 'MedProfile Pro' tracking pending feature requests including conditional section visibility, doctor-oriented UI redesign, glassmorphism effects, and a smart admin dashboard.
